signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119.6M & Rakuten Integration Confirmed (Apr 14, 2026)** | YES | HIGH  
U.S. spot XRP ETFs saw their strongest single-day inflows since Dec 2025 at $119.6 million, paired with Rakuten Wallet integrating XRP into Rakuten Pay for 44 million users to convert to loyalty points, signaling institutional demand and retail utility that could shift prediction markets bullish.[4]

signals.headline: Solana Hits 167M Monthly Holders Record & Alpenglow Upgrade Progress (Apr 14, 2026)** | YES | MED
signals.raw:
Solana Hits 167M Monthly Holders Record & Alpenglow Upgrade Progress (Apr 14, 2026)** | YES | MED  
Solana achieved an all-time high of 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions, with the Alpenglow consensus upgrade advancing toward 150ms finality and institutional ETF holdings from BlackRock/Fidelity growing, potentially impacting ATH prediction markets.[2]

signals.headline: SEC Issues Crypto Interface Guidance at Roundtable (Apr 15, 2026)** | YES | MED
signals.raw:
SEC Issues Crypto Interface Guidance at Roundtable (Apr 15, 2026)** | YES | MED  
SEC clarified rules for crypto interfaces, potentially aiding XRPL's native DEX, amid XRP's technical setup with bullish MACD crossover in a symmetrical triangle, which could influence regulatory clarity bets in prediction markets.[4]
